title: Receive and prepare samples for testing
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Receive and prepare samples for testing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Log samples

pcs.text: Record date (and time of arrival, if required) of samples at workplace

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and match samples with request forms before they are accepted.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Process ‘urgent’ test requests according to workplace requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure security and traceability of all information, laboratory data, records and samples.
